skills.name: Return to Bone
skills.description: BuffWhen Obsidia deals damage to enemies, she gains Bone Energy (Basic Attacks against non-hero units grant 1 Energy, against hero units grant 2 Energy, and skills grant 3 times the Energy. No Energy is gained from hitting creeps). When Bone Energy reaches 30, it forms a Bone Shard, up to 25 shards. When Obsidia uses Basic Attacks, all Bone Shards strike the target, each dealing (7% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and inheriting 7% Attack Effects.

skills.description: Damage AOEObsidia launches an Abyssal Bone Needle dealing 325 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit and triggering Return to Bone on the first enemy hero attack.

skills.name: Mystic Surge
skills.description: BuffSora ascends to Thunder or Torrent via Ultimate. Dealing damage to heroes grants Cloudstep stacks (5 = True Art unlock). Thunder Form: Converts 30% Max HP into Physical Attack at 10% ratio, adopting an assassin style. Torrent Form: Converts each point of Physical Attack into 10 Max HP, adopting a tank style.

skills.name: Sundering Strike
skills.description: Damage MobilityDefault: Strikes twice (140-220 + 50% PA), lunges forward (240-440 + 5% HP). Can dash after. Thunder (Thunderflash): Strikes four times (140-220 + 50% PA), lunges forward (240-440 + 5% HP). Free movement during. Torrent (Overwhelm): Strikes twice with 40% slow (140-220 + 50% PA), lunges with 0.5s stun (240-440 + 5% HP).

skills.name: Windstride
skills.description: Mobility DamageDefault: Leaps forward (140-200 + 55% PA), slams ground with 40% slow 0.5s (140-200 + 8% HP). CD reduced 2s on hit. Thunder (Thunder Rush): Leaps forward (140-200 + 55% PA), summons storm with 50% slow 0.5s (140-200 + 8% HP). Recastable within 4s on hit. Torrent (Skyfall): Leaps with knockback (140-200 + 55% PA), smashes ground with 0.5s airborne (140-200 + 8% HP). CD reduced 2s on hit.

skills.name: Shifting Skies
skills.description: Transformation DamageThunder Ascent: Becomes untargetable briefly, summons 3 lightning strikes (140-200 + 50% PA each). 10s duration. Torrent Ascent: Pulls nearby enemies after delay, deals damage (250-450 + 8% HP). 10s duration. Thunder True Art (Heaven's Wrath): Leaps and strikes area 15 times (60-100 + 40% PA per hit). Free movement. Torrent True Art (Stormbind): Leaps and strikes area 5 times (100-150 + 6% HP per hit) with stun. Free movement, ignores terrain.

skills.name: Platinum Snap
skills.description: Marcel's split soul, Clemar, enters the camera to freeze the moment. Marcel's Basic Attacks deal 50 (+40% Total Physical Attack) (+40% Total Physical Defense) (+40% Total Magic Defense) Physical Damage but cannot Crit. He cannot benefit from extra Attack Speed. Extra HP is converted into 1.5% Hybrid Defense. Clemar automatically snaps photos of nearby enemy heroes, causing a brief Frozen Moment and dealing True Damage equal to 20 + 5% of their Max HP (can trigger attack effects). It also grants a shield of the same amount to Marcel and a nearby allied hero. This effect has a 12s cooldown per target; Marcel Basic Attacks reduce that target's cooldown by 1s.

skills.name: Framed Moment
skills.description: Clemar focuses on an area around Marcel, slowing enemy heroes in range by 20%. After 2.5s, he completes the shot, dealing 370–520 (+50% Total Physical Attack) (+100% Total Physical Defense) (+100% Total Magic Defense) Physical Damage to enemies within range and immobilizing them for 1s.

skills.name: Tracking Shot
skills.description: Marcel enters Tracking Haste for 3s, gaining 15%–27.5% Movement Speed (increases to 75%–112.5% when moving toward an enemy hero). Use again: Marcel dashes in the target direction, leaving a framing phantom behind. If Framed Moment is active, Clemar remains at the original location to continue shooting.

skills.name: Golden Hour
skills.description: Marcel and Clemar perform a joint shoot. After a short delay, Clemar takes a wide-angle shot of a designated area for 3s. During this time, Marcel enters Tracking Haste within the area. All other units are put into Frozen Moment and are immune to all effects except from Marcel. All ranged Basic Attacks and projectiles are also frozen and will resolve after a delay. Golden Hour resets the cooldown of Platinum Snap for each enemy hero.
